title: Dual Port Memory support for repl-seq-mem.

features.name: dual_port_sram_memory_with_registered_reads
features.description: Code should include a sequential memory module with two read ports and one write port, where read addresses are registered and reads are synchronous

features.name: smem_multi_port_inference_in_firrtl
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL smem declaration with multiple infer mport statements for read ports and a write port using the same clock
